allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: ensemble regularization + per-horizon weights + Platt calibration

Step 1: L2 regularization on ensemble weights + bootstrap robust optimization
Step 2: RankXGB multi-horizon independent training \(remove heuristic scaling\)
Step 3: Per-horizon weight optimization \(24h/48h minimize Brier+L2\)
Step 4: Platt Scaling calibration on 24h/48h \(C=0.1\)
Step 1c: Stacking meta-learner C=1.0 -> C=0.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: monotonicity enforcement + disable Platt Scaling + add CLAUDE.md

- Fix submission_postprocess to enforce 12h <= 24h monotonicity
- Disable Platt Scaling \(worsens Brier from 0.03 to 0.10\)
- Add CLAUDE.md with experiment management rules
- Update experiments.md with v2 results

CV Hybrid: 0.9692 \(down from 0.9721\), needs investigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: switch to MEDIUM feature set \(36 features\) for +0.0031 OOF improvement

Feature set comparison: v96624\(16\)=0.9690, medium\(36\)=0.9721, full\(44\)=0.9719.
Added FEATURES_V96624_PLUS \(21 features\) as alternative. Experiment #6 pending LB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
